ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport (e.g., NFL, NBA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the sport's logo image */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL for the sport's icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport related to the league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., AFC, NFC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league related to the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., New England Patriots) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the team's logo image */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL for the team's icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team related to the event */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the event (e.g., 20-17) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for performance records */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport related to the performance metrics */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league related to the performance metrics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team related to the performance metrics */,
  "yesterday_profit" TEXT /* Profit or loss from betting yesterday */,
  "this_week_profit" TEXT /* Profit or loss from betting this week */,
  "this_month_profit" TEXT /* Profit or loss from betting this month */,
  "overall_profit" TEXT /* Total profit or loss overall */,
  "yesterday_record" TEXT /* Bets record yesterday (wins-losses) */,
  "this_week_record" TEXT /* Bets record this week (wins-losses) */,
  "this_month_record" TEXT /* Bets record this month (wins-losses) */,
  "overall_record" TEXT /* Overall bets record (wins-losses) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_performance_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_performance_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., bettor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_betting_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting history record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user related to the betting history */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport related to the betting history */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league related to the betting history */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team related to the betting history */,
  "bet_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the bet */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of the bet (e.g., moneyline, point spread, over/under) */,
  "bet_result" TEXT /* Result of the bet (e.g., win, loss, push) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the bet was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the bet result was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_betting_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_betting_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_betting_history_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_betting_history_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)
